item.title: DOJ Drops Federal Reserve Probe, Clearing Path for Warsh Nomination

item.title: Parent in 40s With $330,000 Seeks Strategy to Fund Child's Lifelong Care
item.description: A parent of a child requiring ongoing support is asking how to structure a $330,000 portfolio to sustain financial security across two generations.

item.title: AMD Stock Rallies Toward Significant Milestone, Analysts Say
